description: Mutable lessons used by aq-slice-helper to reduce context load for recurring dev-cycle slices.

lessons.title: Dashboard HTTP success is not enough; require managed systemd service
lessons.rationale: An unmanaged uvicorn process on 0.0.0.0:8889 can mask an inactive command-center-dashboard-api.service.

lessons.title: Runtime and service changes need docs, dashboard visibility, or explicit non-applicability
lessons.rationale: Hidden behavior drift creates dead-end code and unmanageable features.

lessons.title: Dashboard visibility cards must have registered backend routes and frontend IDs
lessons.rationale: Cards without live routes produce noisy 404s and false operator confidence.

lessons.title: Run cheap syntax and focused guards before full tier0
lessons.rationale: Fast local checks catch most slice errors before spending full QA/runtime budget.
